items.q: Name a major language associated with Finland.
items.explanation: Finnish is commonly associated with Finland.

items.q: Context clues can help infer the meaning of unknown words.
Name a major language associated with Norway.
items.explanation: Norwegian is commonly associated with Norway.

items.a: A word with the opposite meaning
options: A word with the opposite meaning
A word part added to the end
The part of a sentence that performs the action
A word with a similar meaning
items.explanation: 'antonym' means: A word with the opposite meaning.

items.q: A topic sentence introduces the main idea of a paragraph.
items.explanation: It sets focus for the paragraph.

items.q: Name a major language associated with Indonesia.
items.explanation: Indonesian is commonly associated with Indonesia.
